name: Mario 3D Shooter
description: Play Mario 3D Shooter, an action-packed adventure where Mario must rescue the princess once again! Explore colorful 3D levels, defeat enemies, and shoot special diamonds to unlock the exit door. Every stage is filled with obstacles, challenges, and dangerous surprises that test your reflexes and aim. Collect everything you need and help Mario complete his mission.
instructions: WASD to move and mouse to shoot
